titleStmt.title: SII 15.238: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 238. (B.K. No. 4 of 1927-28.) HIRĒMAṆṆŪR, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone built into the wall of Hanumān temple.
This is dated Śaka 1091, Virōdhi, Pushya śu. 5, Thursday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa, corresponding to 1169 A.D., December 25.

It records the renewal of a gift of land for the maintenance of a tank called Hiriyakeṟe of Hiriya-Maṇiyūr, at the request of Dāsabōva, the Adhishṭhāyaka of Jinaśāle, by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Chāvuṇḍa of the Sinda family who was governing Kisukāḍu Seventy, Bāgaḍage Seventy; Nareyaṁgal Twelve and Keḷavāḍi Three Hundred. The earlier part gives a genealogical account of the donor and his exploits.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmara cāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁ
bhāya saṁbhavē . namastasmai varāhāyalīlayā caratē mahī khu
rāntaragatō yasya mēruḥ kaṇakaṇāyatē © © ©
© tadvā¨rddhicāruparikhāsaduvaḷayutamenisi nāḍe sogayisuvudu
jaṁbūdvīpavalli kubhridvaramene nāḍe mērugiri raṁjisugu . Ā kana
kādriyiṁ teṁkalu bhūkāṁtākuṁtaḷōpavaṁtā kāṁtaviṣayarakṣakarī kaliyu
gadalli puṭṭida¨rccāḷukyaru . A cāḷukyamahīśariṁda baḷiyiṁdu¨rddhattaraṁ ge
ldu dhātrīcakraṁ neṟe baṇnisalu bhujabaḷā kuṁtaḷōruvi caṁcaccatu
rāṁganāṁkasamākaṣāgrahaṁ bijjaṇa nopputi¨rppanadaṭaṁ
vidviṣṭavidrāvaṇaṁ . taccakrava¨rttiyaḷiya viditaṁ viśadakī¨rtti cāmuṁḍanripaṁ
niccaṭagali kalikālaviyaccaranene pasarinesadanī vasumatiyoḷu . Ā mahā
nubhāvananvayāvatāramenteṁdoḍe . Ācugibhūmipāḷana sahōdaranapra
timapratāpabhūpācaḷa vajradaṁḍarene nākanripaṁ nṟipatuṁga siṁganārōci
tavikramaṁ naga¨rdda dāsarasaṁ kale jayaśrīcaturapriyaṁ vibhu cavuṁḍa
rasaṁ guṇi cāvabhūbhujaṁ . Avaroḷage . Ahitōdyadbaḷa jāḷukaṁ kadanadoḷu mā
rāṁtu tāgalu mahāmahimaṁ sūligegoṁḍu kōpadodaviṁ koṁdikki vidviṣṭaraṁ mahiyoḷu
tāḷdi sudhāṁśu ni¨rmmaḷayaśaḥ śrīkāṁteyaṁ saṁtataṁ mahanīyaṁ kali cāvuṁ ḍabhūpanesa
daṁ śrī siṁdavaṁśōdbhavaṁ . Avaroḷagācarasaṁgudbhavisidanadhikaprata(tā)panidhi jaya lakṣmī
ravaṇaṁ baṁmmarasaṁ kī¨rttiviḷāsaṁ siṁdavā¨rddhanacaṁdraṁ . Ātananujātanavanī vikhyātaṁ śrī
siṁhajātanuddhataripusaṁghātahariniratanenisidanātana tējaṁ pratāpadiṁdācarasaṁ .
Aṁtenisidācacamūpana kāṁte dayāvaṁte bhāgyavaṁte nitāṁtaṁ śāṁte nayavaṁte satukuḷavaṁ
te mahādēviyeṁba pesariṁdesavaḷu . Ācamahībhujaṁgavesadā mahādēvigeyudugha
vikrama khēcarakī¨rtti saṁbhavisidaṁ kali pa¨rmmamahīdharaṁ manōjñācaraṇaṁ raṇōddha ta viruddhanri
pāḷakajāḷabāḷikālōcananiggaḷadvimalalōḷajaḷāviḷasaṁgarāṁgaṇaṁ . A pemma
bhūpananujaṁ rūpamanōjñaṁ manōjñaguṇagaṇayuktaṁ vēpitaripunripahrida
yāḷāpaṁ cāvuṁḍamaṁḍaḷēśaṁ nega¨rddaṁ . maṁdara dhai¨ryyaṁ ripunripabriṁdaśiraḥkaṁdu
kāḷikēḷīkaḷitaṁ caṁdaladēvīpriyasutaniṁdūjvaḷakī¨rttiyenisidaṁ cāvuṁḍaṁ . munisuṁ
bhīḷanripāḷamēghapajaḷaprōtsārajhaṁjhāniḷaṁ vanadhiprāvritakī¨rtti sāṁdravikiratkā ḷēya
pāpāṁdhakāranirāsōjvaḷacaṁdradīdhitilasaddānaṁ budhabrāta daustyanagōdu bhēdana vajra
vāgalesavaṁ cāvuṁḍabhūpāḷakaṁ . bhīrugaḷaṁ saraṇbuguvaraṁ bhaya duṣṭaranikki niluvaraṁdā
ruvadiṁdiḷātaḷake vapparanāṁtiriyalke pēsi saduvīraraneyde koṁdesava mīsageḷaṁ hurigoṁ
ḍa gaṁḍapeṁḍāramanāḷda siṁdakuḷamaṁḍananoḷu paḍiyappa gaṁḍarāru . samarōdyadbaḷa hoyisa
ḷa kṣitipasēnānīkamoṁdāgi vikramadiṁ tāge parākramayutaṁ siṁdānvayāṁbōdhi
caṁdramanē¨rvvaṭṭi tadīśanaṁ malevaraṁ koṁdugramattēbhasaṁghamanādaṁ piḍidaṁ pratāpa
tapanaṁ cāvuṁḍabhūpāḷakaṁ . nijacātu[¨rvva]ḷaga¨rbhadiṁ bhujabaḷaprakṣōbhadiṁ pāṁ
ḍyanājijayākāṁkṣeyineyde vaṁdu kaḍupiṁdaṁ tāge cāvuṁḍabhūbhujanēkāṁ
gade gelda sainyamanadaṁ kaṁḍuṭṭudaṁ biṭṭu ni¨rvvijeyaṁ kāmanripāḷa nōḍidanavaṁ
beṁgoṭṭu kāḷvaṭṭeyiṁ . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabdamahāmaṁḍaḷēśva
raṁ bhōgāvatīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ vidviṣṭamaṁḍaḷikagirivajradaṁḍa siṁda
kuḷamā¨rttaṁḍa viśamavāhakamanōraṁjana jitaprabhaṁ javaturakayārū
ḍapravuḍarēvaṁta vijayalakṣmīkāṁta madavadarimaṁḍaḷikamadada(¨rdda)na biduḷavidu
ḷitakaṭhōrakaṁṭhīrava raṇaraṁgabhairava virōdhimaṁḍaḷēśa daśavadana vijayōdyama
rāma bhujabaḷabhīma śrīmatu vikramēśvaradēvara śrīpādāṁbhōjabhriṁga sā
hasōttuṁga nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanu mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ cā
vuṁḍarasadēvva¨rkisa kāḍe¨rppattumaṁ bāgaḍageyappattumaṁ narayeṁgallu hanneraḍu
maṁ kaḷavāḍi mūnūṟumaṁ tribhōgābhyaṁtara siddhiyiṁ duṣṭanigrahavi
śiṣṭapratipāḷanayiṁdāḷdarasugeyutamire . Antenisi negaḷda śrīmanmahāmaṁḍa
ḷēśvarana śrīmatu jinasāleyadhiṣṭāyakaṁ dāsabōvaṁ cāvuṁḍarasadēva¨rggebiṁnapaṁge
ydu . śrīmatu hiriya maṇiyūra Ūruṁba hiriyakeṟege Ā holada jīvadhana ni
baruṁ keṟege bhuktisāsanavuḷḷudaṁ dāsabōvaṁ śrīmanmamahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ cāvuṁḍarasa dēvaru
puna¨rbbharaṇavāgi biṭṭa dha¨rmmameṁteṁdaḍe . svasti śrīmatu sakavaruśa 1091 neya virō
dhi saṁvatsarada puśya sudha . 5 brihavāramuttarāyaṇa saṁkramāṇa puṇyadana
doḷu hiriya keṟege Ūriṁ mūḍa Ā keṟeyiṁ hattira teṁkalu biṭṭa mattaru 4 ma
ttaṁ jīvadhana Uṁba holada doddayageṟege Ā keṟeyiṁ teṁkalu biṭṭa mattaru 2 Antu mattaru
Ārumaṁ śrīmanu mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara cāvuṁḍarasadēvaru sa¨rbbanamasyamuṁ sa¨rbbabā
dhaparihāramumāgi biṭṭa dha¨rmma Īṁtī dha¨rmmamaṁ Ūroḍeyaruṁ sa¨rbbagāvuṁḍugaḷuṁ [A]
ṟuvattokkaluṁ Adhikārigaḷuṁ pratipāḷisidava¨rgge gaṁge gaye prayāge vāraṇāsi
gurukṣētrameṁba puṇyatī¨rtthaṁgaḷoḷu sāsi¨rvva brāhmaṇaruṁ sāsi¨rvva tapōdhana¨rgge
suva¨rṇnadi paṁcaratnadoḷu kaṭṭisi sahasra kapilegaḷaṁ Ubhayamukhidānaṁ
goṭṭa phalamaku . Īṁtī dha¨rmmamanaḷidava¨rgge Ā tī¨rtthadoḷu Ā kapilegaḷaṁ Ā
brāhmaṇarumanā tapōdhanarumanaḷida paṁcamahāpātakarapparu . © © .
sāmānyōyaṁ dha¨rmmaśētunripāṇaṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadu(d)bhiḥ bhūyō bhū
yō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā śaṣṭi¨rvaru
śasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 15.238 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
